items.ex: The cathedral is a must-see attraction for every visitor.

items.ex: Travelling abroad really broadens your horizons.
items.def: to learn new things and see life differently.

items.ex: The Eiffel Tower is the most famous landmark in Paris.
items.def: a famous and important place to visit.

items.ex: We spent the afternoon wandering around the old town.
items.def: to walk slowly without a specific plan.

items.ex: This tiny village is a real hidden gem few tourists know.
items.def: a wonderful place that few people know about.

items.en: to get a taste of local life
items.ex: Visiting markets lets you get a taste of local life.
items.def: to experience how local people live.

items.def: to arrange for something before you travel.

items.ex: We carefully planned our itinerary to avoid wasting time.
items.def: to make a detailed plan for a trip.

items.ex: Travelling on a tight budget means choosing cheaper hostels.
items.def: having little money to spend while traveling.

items.ex: Never travel abroad without proper travel insurance.
items.def: insurance that covers problems during travel.

items.ex: Experienced travellers always learn to pack light.
items.def: to travel with only a few clothes or items.

items.ex: After the long flight, jet lag kept me awake all night.

items.ex: We had a six-hour layover in Istanbul.
items.def: A short stop between two parts of a journey.

items.def: To arrive at a hotel and get your room.

items.ex: Travelling alone forces you to step out of your comfort zone.
items.def: To do things that are new and uncomfortable for you.

items.ex: Our trip helped us make unforgettable memories together.
items.def: To have experiences you will always remember happily.

items.ex: Many people travel simply to escape the daily routine.

items.ex: A quiet holiday is the perfect way to recharge your batteries.
items.def: To rest so you feel full of energy again.

items.def: A city that is very busy and full of activity.

items.ex: We stayed in a picturesque village surrounded by mountains.
items.def: a very pretty village that looks like a picture

items.def: a place that attracts tourists but charges too much money

items.ex: We loved the cosy guesthouse run by a friendly family.
items.def: a small, comfortable hotel like a home

items.def: an area of natural beauty that is very impressive

items.ex: London is known for its cosmopolitan atmosphere.
items.def: a feeling of a place with people from many cultures

items.def: a place far from cities and with few people
